title: Fragment: Love'S Tender Atmosphere.
content:
There is a warm and gentle atmosphere
    About the form of one we love, and thus
    As in a tender mist our spirits are
    Wrapped in the ... of that which is to us
    The health of life's own life -
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Percy Bysshe Shelley delivers a powerful performance in "Fragment: Love'S Tender Atmosphere."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
